argv:
set -euo pipefail
jq -s -e 'length == 6 and all(.[]; .status == "passed") and ([.[].cases[]] | length) == 24 and all(.[].cases[]; .status == "passed")' /private/tmp/guru145-phase2-evidence.zQkwek/shared-eval-guru-sync-base.stdout /private/tmp/guru145-phase2-evidence.zQkwek/shared-eval-guru-discover-change-context.stdout /private/tmp/guru145-phase2-evidence.zQkwek/shared-eval-guru-clarify-requirements.stdout /private/tmp/guru145-phase2-evidence.zQkwek/shared-eval-guru-review-contract-wording.stdout /private/tmp/guru145-phase2-evidence.zQkwek/shared-eval-guru-review-change-request.stdout /private/tmp/guru145-phase2-evidence.zQkwek/shared-eval-guru-create-task-workspace.stdout >/dev/null
printf 'SHARED_EVAL=6/24\n'
commands.summary: 六包 shared production eval 聚合为 6 runs、24/24 cases passed。

argv:
set -euo pipefail
skills=(guru-sync-base guru-discover-change-context guru-clarify-requirements guru-review-contract-wording guru-review-change-request guru-create-task-workspace)
targets=(.trellis/guru-team/skills/packages .agents/skills .codex/skills .claude/skills .cursor/skills)
checks=0
for skill in "${skills[@]}"; do
  source_dir="trellis/skills/guru-team/packages/$skill"
  for target_root in "${targets[@]}"; do
    target_dir="$target_root/$skill"
    diff -qr "$source_dir" "$target_dir" >/dev/null
    while IFS= read -r source_file; do
      relative_file="${source_file#$source_dir/}"
      target_file="$target_dir/$relative_file"
      cmp -s "$source_file" "$target_file"
      [[ "$(stat -f '%Lp' "$source_file")" == "$(stat -f '%Lp' "$target_file")" ]]
    done < <(find "$source_dir" -type f -print)
    checks=$((checks+1))
  done
done
[[ "$checks" -eq 30 ]]
printf 'PACKAGE_PARITY=%s/30\n' "$checks"
commands.summary: Canonical、installed、Codex、Claude、Cursor 六包 bytes/modes parity 30/30 通过。

argv:
set -euo pipefail
changed=$( { git diff --name-only origin/main...HEAD; git diff --name-only; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard; } | LC_ALL=C sort -u )
for entry in 'CI:^\.github/workflows/' 'CONTAINER:(^|/)(Dockerfile[^/]*|docker-compose[^/]*)(/|$)' 'K8S:(^|/)(k8s|kustomize)(/|$)' 'HELM:(^|/)helm(/|$)' 'DB:(^|/)(database/migrations|db/migrations)(/|$)' 'MAKE:(^|/)Makefile$' 'DEPS:(^|/)(package-lock\.json|pnpm-lock\.yaml|yarn\.lock|go\.mod|go\.sum|requirements[^/]*\.txt|pyproject\.toml|Pipfile\.lock)$'; do label="${entry%%:*}"; pattern="${entry#*:}"; matches=$(printf '%s\n' "$changed" | rg "$pattern" || true); [[ -z "$matches" ]]; printf '%s_PATHS=0\n' "$label"; done
jq -e '(.skills|length)==6 and ([.skills[].id]|sort)==(["guru-clarify-requirements","guru-create-task-workspace","guru-discover-change-context","guru-review-change-request","guru-review-contract-wording","guru-sync-base"]|sort) and ([.skills[].exit_bindings[]]|length)==24' trellis/skills/guru-team/migrations/stage0-minimal-handoff.json >/dev/null
printf 'STAGE0_SET=6/24\n'
secret_matches=$( { git diff --no-ext-diff --unified=0 origin/main...HEAD; git diff --no-ext-diff --unified=0; } | rg 'BEGIN (RSA|OPENSSH|EC|DSA) PRIVATE KEY|AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|gh[pousr]_[A-Za-z0-9]{36,}' || true)
[[ -z "$secret_matches" ]]
printf 'SECRET_MATERIAL_MATCHES=0\n'
commands.summary: CI/CD、container、K8s/Kustomize、Helm、DB migration、Makefile、dependency paths 均为 0；Stage0 集合 6/24；secret-shaped diff 命中 0。
